snps.effect_template: MC1R R151C variant. Strongly associated with fair skin, red hair, and melanoma risk.
CDKN2A region variant. Affects cell cycle control and melanoma susceptibility.

recommendation_template: SPF 30-50+ daily. Avoid tanning beds. Monthly self-skin exams. Annual dermatologist check if fair-skinned or have many moles. Seek care for changing moles (ABCDE rule).

studies.title: Genome-wide association study identifies three loci associated with melanoma risk
studies.finding: MC1R and CDKN2A/9p21 confirmed as major melanoma risk loci
